headline: Nvidia, Boeing Lead 5 Dow Stocks Near Buy Points. They Share This Flaw.
summary: Nvidia and Boeing lead five Dow stocks to watch near buy points this week.  Nvidia stock and its peers have rallied in a soaring stock market, with earnings out of the way for some of these names but not for others.  Walmart, Goldman Sachs and UnitedHealth also make the cut.
